scripts.android:run: cd android/app && ./gradlew :app:installDebug && adb shell am start -n ai.nexus.android/.MainActivity
scripts.ios:build: bash -lc 'cd ios/app && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Nexus.xcodeproj -scheme Nexus -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build'
scripts.ios:open: cd ios/app && xcodegen generate && open Nexus.xcodeproj
scripts.ios:run: bash -lc 'cd ios/app && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Nexus.xcodeproj -scheme Nexus -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build && xcrun simctl boot "${IOS_SIM:-iPhone 17}" || true && xcrun simctl launch booted ai.nexus.ios'
